title: Panel Composition and Panel Interview. The Proponents shall undergo a
content: 12 panel interview to ascertain their qualifications and compliance with the requirements 13 under these Rules. If deemed qualified, the applicant shall be notified and required to 14 submit the post-qualification requirements. 15 16 The Members of the Panel shall be constituted to include representatives from different 17 offices and bureaus of the Department. 18 19
